alerts.headline: Lake Wind Advisory issued April 20 at 12:24AM PDT until April 20 at 10:00PM PDT by NWS Reno NV
alerts.description:
* WHAT...Southwest winds 20 to 25 mph with gusts up to 40 mph.

* WHERE...Greater Reno-Carson City-Minden Area and Mineral and
Southern Lyon Counties. Impacted lakes include Washoe and Walker
lakes.

* WHEN...From 1 PM this afternoon to 10 PM PDT this evening.

* IMPACTS...Small boats, kayaks and paddle boards will be prone to
capsizing and should remain off lake waters until conditions
improve.
alerts.instruction:
Check lake conditions before heading out and be prepared for a
sudden increase in winds and wave heights. Consider postponing
boating activities on the lake until a day with less wind.

alerts.headline: High Wind Warning issued April 20 at 10:32AM PDT until April 21 at 11:00PM PDT by NWS Las Vegas NV
alerts.description:
* WHAT...South winds 25 to 35 mph with gusts up to 55 mph expected.

* WHERE...Death Valley National Park.

* WHEN...From 10 AM to 11 PM PDT Tuesday.

* IMPACTS...Damaging winds will blow down trees and power lines.
Widespread power outages are expected. Travel will be difficult,
especially for high-profile vehicles. Areas of blowing dust are
likely near dry lake beds.

* ADDITIONAL DETAILS...Strong winds will impact travelers on Highway
190 and State Route 178.
alerts.instruction:
Watch for falling debris, tree limbs and downed power lines or
poles. Use extra caution if you must drive.
